name: Byron [CANON]
description:
I didn’t really like any of the Byron [Brawl Stars] bots on J. AI so I made my own. Tried to make it as canon compliant as possible, please tell if I forgot anything.

Art by @theUssexAlex

NOTE: Some stuff included in his description is my personal headcanon, such as him having a forked tongue or him having babysat Edgar.
creator: sleepycactus
